title: Installing Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How do I install approved software from the software catalog?
A: To install approved software from the software catalog, first, ensure you are connected to the company network. Open the Software Center application, which can be found in the Start menu or by searching for it in the search bar. Once open, navigate to the 'Applications' tab to view the list of available software. Find the software you need and click on it to view details. Click the 'Install' button to begin the installation process. If prompted, follow any additional on-screen instructions to complete the installation. If you encounter any issues, contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
